description: Style Note Being fashionable means being able to combine the right amount of comfort with a bucket load of style in your outfit. Wranger goes colourful and super trendy with this tank top. Pair it with your favourite pair of chinos or a pair of comfortable shorts and accessorise subtly. Product Details A light green top with short sleeves, spread collar with a split V neckline and a half buttoned placket, crystal embellishment on the left chest and seams on the left and right below the shoulders for better Fit Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold, inside out, using a mild detergent with like colours Do not bleach Do not iron on print or embellishments Do not wring Tumble dry and flat dry in shade Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
